name: Decorative Glass Match Holder Set - Threshold™
description:
This Decorative Glass Match Holder Set from Threshold™ is a stylish and functional addition to your home. Made of glass, this cloche features a curved body that elevates the appearance of the matchsticks. It houses an assortment of 70 matchsticks and boasts a striker flint on the front for convenient use.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
